generalities.text: Main THE ENCYCLOPEDIA OF PURE MATERIA MEDICA By TIMOTHY F. ALLEN, A.M., M.D. Presented by Médi-T <<<<< CASTOREUM. SEXUAL ORGANS. ► Profuse watery leucorrha (fourth day), [2] . ► Thick leucorrha (sixth and seventh day), [2] . [180.] ► Burning leucorrha (fifth and sixth day), [2] . ► Menstruation one day too soon, in a maid whose menstruation was not easily disordered, [2] . ► Menstruation one day too soon, with pain in the abdomen and small of the back (twelfth day), [2] . ► Menstruation six days too early, [2] . ► Menstruation, which had ceased the previous day, returned after two does, and continued for one day, [2] . RESPIRATORY ORGANS. ► Hoarse, so that she was obliged to hawk frequently, without being able to loosen anything (seventh day), [2] . ► Hoarseness, without cough, in the morning, passing away during the day (eighth and ninth days), [2] . ► Cough at night, with burning in the throat during cough (fifteenth day), [2] . ► Frequent slow, deep inspiration, with short expiration, [1] . ► Shortness of the breath when walking, especially up a hill, [2] . [190.] ► Shortness of the breath, and on breathing deeply, stitches in the middle of the chest, when walking and sitting, from 12 at night till 9 A.M. (third day), [2] . ► Difficult breathing, in short gasps, with frequent slow, deep inspiration, [1] . CHEST. ► Heat in the chest, as if fire was burning in it, [1] . ► Spasmodic pain across the chest, [1] . ► Pressure, as from a great weight, on the middle of the chest, internally, in the forenoon, while sitting, lasting one minute (third day), [2] . ► Sudden twinging in both breasts, with chilliness, so that it took away her breath, lasting five minutes, frequently intermitting at 8 P.M. (sixth day), [2] . ► Front. ► Sensation of internal heat under the sternum, [1] . ► Pressure on both sides of the sternum, especially during expiration, [1] . ► Sensation beneath the breast-bone as if something heavy were lying under it; on deep breathing, it feels as heavy as a hundredweight on the chest, though only transiently (fourth day), [2] . ► Pain on touch under the sternum, [1] . ► Sides. [200.] ► Pain, like stitches beneath the right breast, without affecting the respiration, [2] . ► Several sharp stitches in the lower part of the left breast, so that it takes away her breath, [2] . ► Some sharp stitches beneath the left breast, in the forepart, near the pit of the stomach, after a few paroxysms of coughing (first day), [2] . NECK AND BACK. ► Neck. ► Sensation of stiffness in the neck and throat, on moving the head, in the afternoon and evening (seventh day), [2] . ► Drawings in the tendons of the neck, during rest and motion, at 7 P.M. (seventeenth day), [2] . ► Severe drawings in the tendons of the neck, on moving the head, in the forenoon (eleventh day), [2] . ► Dorsal. ► Twitchings in the right shoulder-blade, as if one touched it with the finger (thirteenth day), [2] . ► Severe sharp stitches in the left shoulder-blade, towards its external border (first day), [2] . ► Very sudden painful stitches in the left shoulder-blade, extending towards the shoulder (first day), [2] . ► Sharp stitches between the shoulders, through the chest, into the pit of the stomach, worse on inspiration (for half an hour), and returning after one hour, [2] . [210.] ► Sticking-burning in the right side of the spine, behind the lowest ribs, and immediately afterwards the same sensations farther forward, in the afternoon, while sitting (third day), [2] . ► Sacral. ► Sensation of painful tension in the sacrum, on stretching (twentieth day), [2] . ► Pain in the sacrum and back, as if sore, during rest and motion, in the afternoon (fourteenth day), [2] . ► Pain in the sacrum, as if beaten, day and night, during menstruation, [2] . ► A sore pain, as if from a fresh wound, in the loins, above the left hip-bone, [1] . EXTREMITIES IN GENERAL. ► Twitchings, now here, now there, in the hands, arms, feet, and soles (thirteenth day), [2] . ► Twitchings in the arms and legs, after sleeping, in the evening, on account of which she was frequently awakened (fifteenth day), [2] . ► As soon as she got into bed, violent pain in the right shoulder, extending to the elbow, and in the right knee, disappearing for some time upon pressure and rubbing, for several nights (eleventh day), [2] . ► Frequent tearings in both shoulders and in the thighs, above the knees (seventh day), [2] . SUPERIOR EXTREMITIES. ► Shoulder. ► Pain in the right shoulder, as from a heavy weight, [1] . [220.] ► Tearing in the lower portion of the anterior surface of the right shoulder, extending into the shoulder-joint, not aggravated by motion, with bruised pain after pressure (third day), [2] . ► Severe tearings in the right shoulder-joint, extending thence down the bone into the elbow-joint, before midnight, lasting till midnight, in bed (sixth day), [2] . ► Arm. ► Painful twitching on the inner surface of the left upper arm, afterwards also in the right upper arm, at 9 P.M. (fourteenth day), [2] . ► Tearing extending from the middle of the right upper arm to the middle of the forearm, [2] . ► Tearings in the upper arms, on lying upon them, disappearing on lying on the sound side (fourteenth night), [2] . ► Severe tearing in the upper arm prevented sleep (eleventh night), [2] . ► Elbow. ► Tearing pain in the right elbow, during rest (fourth day), [2] . ► Twitching-tearing in the condyles of the elbows, [2] . ► Forearm. ► A twitching or jerking in the right forearm, followed by sticking in the left lowest ribs, when sneezing (fourteenth day), [2] . ► Sharp stitch in the right forearm, on the inner surface, just above the wrist, [2] . [230.] ► Tearing in the left forearm, about the inner surface of the wrist-joint (seventh day), [2] . ► Hand. ► Some stitches, as with needles, in the hollow of the right hand, near the ball of the thumb (first day), [2] . ► Tearing in the outer border of the right hand (eleventh day), [2] . ► Fingers. ► Sharp stitches in the right thumb, between the second and last joints (third day), [2] . ► Some fine stitches in the ball of the right thumb, then in the tips of the right index and middle fingers, at 9 P.M. (third day), [2] . ► Painful tearing in the first joint of the thumb (first day), [2] . INFERIOR EXTREMITIES. ► Weariness of the lower limbs, during the whole proving, [2] . ► Hip. ► Intermitting fine stitches in the left hip, in the afternoon (first day), [2] . ► Thigh. ► Weary pain in the middle of the thigh, and afterwards in the whole limb, during menstruation (nineteenth day), [2] . ► Knee. ► Tearing on the inner surface of both knees, during rest, somewhat relieved by walking, but disappearing on rubbing, frequently in the afternoon (third day), [2] . [240.] ► Severe tearing in both knees, in the afternoon, which frequently intermitted, lasting till 12 at night, and only relieved for a short time by rubbing (sixth day), [2] . ► Leg. ► Tearing on the outer surface of the right lower leg, in the forenoon (seventh day), [2] . ► Severe tearings on the inner surface of the right leg, disappearing on rubbing, but not on motion, at evening (first day), [2] . ► Drawings in the calves, and a sensation of fatigue on motion, more in the afternoon, [2] . ► Drawing and crawling in both calves, when sitting, disappearing on rubbing, [2] . ► Tearing in both calves, relieved by rubbing at 5 P.M. (fourteenth day), [2] . ► Foot. ► Weariness in the feet, pain in the small of the back, pressure in the vertex and forehead, during menstruation, [2] . ► Painful tearing in the right instep, when sitting (fifth day), [2] . ► Sore pain in the bottom of the heel, relieved by pressure, so severe that it woke her from sleep, at 4 A.M., and lasted half an hour (thirteenth day), [2] . ► Toes. ► Stitches, as with needles, and crawling in the right great toe, at 5 P.M. (fourteenth day), [2] . GENERALITIES. [250.] ► Prostration after dinner, and an annoying sensation in the stomach, as if it were full, as though she had eaten too much, [2] . ► Internal restlessness, anxious tossing about in bed, and frequent waking, [2] . SKIN. ► Itching on the left concha, not relieved by scratching (fifth day), [2] . SLEEP AND DREAMS. ► Sleepiness. ► Frequent yawning, during shivering (third day), [2] . ► Sleepy, the eyes will close, relieved in the open air, at 2 P.M., [2] . ► Sleeplessness. ► Night very restless, without any known cause (fifteenth and sixteenth days), [2] . ► Very uneasy during the first sleep, from 7 to 9 P.M., she woke frequently, and only had sound sleep towards morning, but after waking she was very fretful and peevish (twelfth day), [2] . ► Uneasy sleep, entirely sleepless, especially towards morning (eighth day), [2] . ► Could not sleep long in the evening, sleep very restless (sixth day), [2] . ► Startings and jumpings in sleep, after midnight, from which she woke anxious, but soon fell asleep again (sixteenth and seventeenth nights), [2] . [260.] ► Sleep frequently interrupted by toothache, [2] . ► Unintelligible talking during sleep (fourth day), [2] . ► She cried out at night, in an angry tone, that she must be waked, during menstruation, [2] . ► Dreams. ► Dream that the left arm was covered with burning blisters, the pain of which woke her; the arm continued to burn even the whole following forenoon (eleventh day), [2] . ► Dreams of quarrels between near relations, during menstruation (fourteenth day), [2] . ► Dream of robbers and murderers, who attacked her and her mother; she cried out and awoke (fourth day), [2] . ► Dream that her parents were dead, on account of which she was very much alarmed (thirteenth night), [2] . ► Dream that she would kill her father; she tried to cry out, but could not, on account of which she was very oppressed; a kind a nightmare, [2] . FEVER. ► Chilliness. ► Shivering at 5 A.M. in bed, relieved by warm covering, [2] . ► Sudden shaking, with attacks of icy coldness in the back, in the afternoon (third day), [2] . [270.] ► Chilliness and ill-humor, the whole afternoon and evening (fourth day), [2] . ► Chilliness at night; it was with difficulty that she could get warm, [2] . ► Constant chilliness during menstruation, though she was easily warmed again by the stove, [2] . ► Chill at 5 P.M., so violent that she was obliged to lie down, when it disappeared after half an hour (twelfth day), [2] . ► Chill at 5 P.M., with shivering and inclination to lie down, when it disappeared, after a quarter of an hour (tenth day), [2] . ► Chill from 7 to 8 P.M., especially in the back, without thirst, not relieved by warmth of the stove, disappearing after lying down (sixth day), [2] . ► Chill at 9 P.M., which was not relieved by the warmth of the stove; she was obliged to lie down, but the chill lasted the whole night till morning (eleventh day), [2] . ► Chill at 9.30 P.M., with shivering of the body, especially in the back, where the chill commences, not relieved by the warmth of the stove (twelfth day), [2] . ► Chill during and preceding the pains (second day), [2] . ► After the chill, neither heat nor thirst, [2] . [280.] ► Violent shaking chill, relieved by the warmth of the stove, and when it returned relieved entirely after lying down, without thirst, from 7.30 to 8.30 P.M. (first day), [2] . ► Chill and shivering, relieved by the warmth of the stove (sixth day), [2] . ► Shivering over the whole back, then in the vertex and forehead, like a drawing together, disappearing on touch, at 3 P.M. (third day), [2] . ► Shivering stops for five minutes and then returns; it extends only to the elbows and feet; chill after the shivering (third day), [2] . ► Chilliness in the back, as if one had wiped her with a cold wet cloth, in the afternoon, disappearing after lying down (first day), [2] . ► Heat. ► Sensation of heat during the whole proving, without thirst, [2] . ► Heat after lying down in the evening, and lasting the whole night, [2] . ► Heat in the hands, with distended veins, [1] . ► Sweat. ► Sweat from 2 to 4 A.M., without marked exhaustion afterwards (tenth day), [2] . ► Profuse sweat from midnight till 2 A.M., then only moderate warmth till morning, [2] . CONDITIONS. ► Aggravation. ► ( Morning ), After rising, heaviness in the head; 10 o'clock, stitches behind frontal eminence; odor from mouth; after waking, dryness in mouth; after waking, bitterness in mouth; during menstruation after waking, sensation in stomach; in bed, pain about stomach, etc.; while sitting, stitches in hypochondriac region; must hurry to stool; hoarseness; at 5 o'clock, in bed, shivering. ► ( Forenoon ), At 10 o'clock, stitches behind frontal eminence; stitches on right side of head; tearing on tip of ear; sounds in ear; pain in throat; rawness in throat; moving about in abdomen, etc.; two evacuations; pressure on chest; drawings in tendons of neck; tearing on right leg. ► ( Noon ), Especially while eating twitching, etc., about navel, etc. ► ( Afternoon ), Sad, etc.; melancholy, etc.; despondent, etc., stitches in parietal bone; twitching in occiput; while standing, pains on side of occiput; eyes burn, etc.; biting in inner canthus; tearing in right concha, etc.; at 6 o'clock, twitching in lower lip, etc.; tearing in lower jaw, etc.; on eating, toothache; at 5 o'clock, toothache in right side; something acid from tooth; pains in back teeth ; at 5 o'clock, drawing, etc., in tongue; during menstruation, thirst; from 6 to 7 o'clock, great thirst; distension of abdomen; passage of flatus, etc.; from 11 to 4 o'clock, pain in abdomen; stitches in abdomen; from 6 to 7 o'clock, twinging in abdomen; during menstruation, dragging in groins, etc.; stiffness, in neck, etc., while sitting, burning in spine; pain sacrum, etc., tearing in knees; drawing in calves, etc.; shaking; chilliness, etc.; at 5 o'clock, chill in back. ► ( Towards evening ), Pain in stomach. ► ( Evening ), Pressure in forehead; beating, etc., in forehead; during menstruation headache, etc.; at 6 o'clock, tearing, etc., in forehead; beating, etc.; in forehead; tearing in temples, etc.; while walking, tearing in the side of the head; by the light, burning of the eyes; when looking sharply at work, inclination to strain vision; at 8 o'clock, tearing in teeth; pain in back tooth; 6 to 8.30 o'clock, burning in throat; no appetite for warm food; eructations; after eating soup, abdomen feels full; twinging in abdomen; stitch in left groin; diarrha; two stools, etc.; during and after urinating, burning in urethra; stiffness in neck, etc., tearing in right leg; chilliness, etc., from 7 to 8 o'clock, chill; after lying down, heat. ► ( Night ), Anxious; at 10 o'clock, stitches in abdomen; cough; on getting into bed, pain in shoulder; chilliness; chill. ► ( Before midnight ), In bed, tearings in shoulder-joint. ► ( After midnight ), Waking, from fright; startings, etc., in sleep. ► ( Towards morning ), Uneasy sleep. ► ( Air ), Pain in teeth. ► ( In open air ), Pain in teeth. ► ( Ascending a hill ), Shortness of breath. ► ( Cold ), Tearing in eyetooth. ► ( After dinner ), Pain in head, etc.; heaviness, etc., in vertex; burning on the tongue; thirst ; when stooping and rising up again, eructations; prostration, etc. ► ( After eating ), Eructations. ► ( Expiration ), Pressure on both sides of sternum. ► ( Inspirations ), Stitches between shoulders. ► ( Deep inspiration ), Pain in abdomen. ► ( Lying down ), Especially on right side, and still worse if she lies on back, fulness in stomach, etc. ► ( During menstruation ), Fretful, etc.; twitching in temple; biting in eye; looks pale, etc.; as soon as she begins to eat, toothache; rawness in throat; pain in abdomen; pain in sacrum; pain in thigh, etc.; weariness in feet, etc.; cried out at night, etc.; dreams; chilliness. ► ( Pressure ), Headache on vertex. ► ( During rest ), Tearing on knees. ► ( When sneezing ), Twitching in right forearm. ► ( After supper ), Nausea, etc. ► ( Sitting ), Tearing in forehead, etc.; throbbing in occiput; drawing, etc.; in both calves; tearing in right instep. ► ( Standing ), After dinner, throbbing in right temple. ► ( On stretching ), Sensation in sacrum. ► ( Touch ), Pain in back teeth. ► ( After urinating ), Nausea, etc. ► ( After a vexation ), Pain in head, etc. ► ( After waking ), Fretful, etc. ► ( When walking ), Pressure in left flank. ► Amelioration. ► ( Towards evening ), Lively. ► ( Open air ), Tearing from temples; sleepiness. ► ( In bed ), Tearing, etc., in forehead disappears. ► ( Bending body ), Pain in abdomen. ► ( Boring in ear ), Roaring, etc.; in ear. ► ( Eructation ), Nausea. ► ( After lying down ), Chilliness in back disappears. ► ( Lying on left side ), Fulness in stomach, etc. ► ( Pressure ), Tearing from temples; pain in abdomen; stitches in abdomen; pain in hell. ► ( Rubbing ), Tearings in right leg; tearing in calves. ► ( Taking soup ), Sensation in stomach; pain in stomach, etc. ► ( On touch ), Shivering disappears. ► ( Warmth ), Pain in abdomen; stitches in abdomen. ► ( Application of warm cloths ), Distension of abdomen. ► ( Warm water ), Toothache. SUPPLEMENT: CASTOR. Authority. 3 , William Alexander, M.D., Exper. Essays, London, 1770, p. 83. [290.] ► I took a bolus of 10 grains of Castor, made with a little syrup of sugar. I felt no other effects than a few disagreeable eructations. The following day I took a bolus of 1/2 drachm of Castor; the only effect it had was the eructations, which were pretty much the same as in the last experiment. Two days after this I took 1 drachm. The mercury in the thermometer at my stomach, which before taking it stood at 91 1/2°, was in an hour after risen to 92 1/2°, where it continued till the thermometer was removed. The eructations were not so frequent, nor so disagreeable as in the former experiments. The two following days, I took two more boluses of Castor; the first containing 1 1/2 drachms, and the second 2 drachms. I was sensible of no other effect than the eructations, which, indeed, were but few and trifling. The pulse was not affected in any of the experiments, nor the temperature, except in the third experiment, [3] . Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main

Clinical: Chorea; Convulsions; Digestion, disordered; Dysmenorrhœa; Eclampsia; Flatulence; Hernia; Hysteria; Ileus; Paralysis; Pregnancy, vomiting of; Reaction, deficient; Sexual organs, inflammation of; spasms of; Sycosis; Tetanus; Typhoid, lack of recuperation after; Typhus; Warts; Yawning

Hoarseness, with disposition to clear throat. Breathing: short, difficult; short breath when ascending; very deep with heat in heart and in face; slow, deep inspiration with short expiration. Stitches in chest; heat as if fire were burning in it. On taking deep breath sensation as though something heavy lay under sternum. Nocturnal dragging in shoulders and arms. Spasms of hands and feet. Hands hot with swelling of veins. Weakness of the lower limbs. Jerking of small groups of muscular fibres. Chorea; epilepsy; cramps in various parts. Prostration after dinner, and annoying sensation as if she had eaten too much. Internal restlessness.

Jerking of small groups of muscular fibres. Sensation of heaviness in whole body. Trembling of limbs. (OBS :) Chorea, epilepsy, whooping cough, nervous palpitation, cramp in various parts of body, and tetanus. Paralysis. Left : behind, ear, pain ; lower row of molars pain ; abdomen, pain ; ilium, soreness ; flank, pressure. Right : forehead, dull headache ; shoulder, pain. Within out : dull headache ; pressure in region of liver. As if a string was pulling centre of tongue towards hyoid bone ; as though stomach would go to sleep ; as though something heavy lay under sternum. Tearing drawing pains in various parts of body. Burning : in tongue ; at anus ; in breast ; as of fire. Stitching : pains on both sides of abdomen ; in chest. Griping : in stomach. Pain : behind left ear ; in molar teeth ; under sternum ; in r. shoulder. Weight : at stomach. Heat : in breast and face ; under sternum. Drawing pain : in head. Pressure : on sides of sternum ; in left flank ; in forehead ; in region of liver. Heaviness : in whole body ; under sternum ; in stomach. Cramplike pains : across breast. Tension : in stomach. Emptiness : in stomach. Dryness : of œsophagus. (OBS :) Enteralgia, having its seat in small intestines, no evacuations ; appearing suddenly after mental emotions, or getting cold feet ; accompanied by pallor, cold sweat and fainting. Inflammatory and spasmodic affections of digestive and sexual organs. Hysterical individuals.

keynotes.text: Castoreum resembles Ambra, Moschus, Ignatia, and Valerian. It is suited to nervous women, with pains, cramps, weakness after severe illness; hysterical individuals; abdominal soreness; nervous attacks when the aura starts from abdomen. The pains are > by pressure. Menstrual colic, with pallor and cold sweat. Prostration is a leading feature in the effects of the drug. There is also a feeling of fulness in the stomach as if too much had been eaten. Castoreum when fresh is yellow and of the consistence of syrup when dry it is dark red or brown and of the consistence of hard wax. Teste remarks that it has been regarded as a resinous substance, and he observes, moreover, that the beaver feeds almost entirely on the resinous bark of pine-trees. In Siberia beavers feed on the bark of the birch, which may make a difference in the effects of Castoreum from different countries. Caspari proved Russian Castor., Nenning that of Southern Europe. Teste concluded from analogy that Castor. would be an antisycotic, and he proved his point by initiating with it the cure of a case of pedunculated vegetations around the anus in a hysterical young woman. Thuja completed the cure. Teste places Castor. in the Thuja group with Plat. and Bism. He quotes from Trousseau and Pideux the following indications, which he confirms:─(1) "Amenorrhœa, accompanied with painful and tympanitic swelling of the abdomen. We mean the cases where only a few drops of blood escape from the uterus, with a sort of uterine tenesmus." (2) "The cases of colic to which Castoreum seems to be principally adapted are of the nervous kind, that seem to be particularly seated in the small intestine. They are accompanied with paleness and cold sweats, a sudden sinking of strength, as if the very principle of life had been struck down. They are without any alvine evacuations, come suddenly, after lively emotions, a cold on the bowels or by the feet, as after long exposure to a cold rain; they constitute a sort of that passion termed by authors miserere." Castor. causes jerking in small groups of muscular fibres; a sensation of heaviness of whole body; trembling of limbs.

_raw: Compare: Ambra, Mosch., Nux v.; in lack of reaction, Pso.; Thuja (sycosis). Antidoted by: Colch.
Antidotes : Camphor., Opium and vegetable acids
Compare : Ambra gris., Ignat., Moschus, Valer., especially in nervous women with pains, cramps and weakness after severe illness

mental_emotional.text: Peevish; indisposed to talk, very sensitive to all kinds of impressions. Irritable in morning and cheerful abandon in evening. Great sadness and excessive susceptibility, with easily provoked lachrymation.

Very peevish humor, indisposed to talk. Very sensitive to all kinds of impressions. Irritable in morning : cheerful abandon in evening. Melancholic and full of anxious longing. θ Hysteria. Angry exclamations during sleep. Giddiness and fainting.

head.text: Headache with giddiness and fainting; headache leaving head very sensitive to touch. Pain at the vertex and throbbing in the head as if there were an ulcer in the brain, aggravated by contact and external pressure. Fulness and heaviness of the head as if it were going to burst. Acute drawing pains in the forehead and eyes.
Headache, with giddiness and fainting. Heaviness, with drawing pain in head. Transitory pressure in forehead. Dull headache from in outward in right forehead.

eyes.text: Pressure in the eyes, on viewing fixedly a distant object. Nocturnal lachrymation and agglutination of the eyes. Stars, clouds, and on viewing fixedly a distant object, mist before the sight. Susceptibility of the eyes to the light of the sun, and to that of candles.
Dimness of vision, and lachrymation. θ Catarrh. Appearance before eyes, as though he had not slept enough. Eyes are agglutinated nearly all night.

ears.text: Acute dragging in the ears. Tinkling, buzzing, and gurgling in the ears, dispersed by boring the ear with the finger.
Earache and buzzing in ears. Pain behind left ear. Otorrhœa.

nose.text: Obstruction of the nose. Flow of aqueous, acrid, corrosive mucus from the nose.

mouth_throat.text: Toothache when eating, provoked by cold and mitigated by hot things. Odontalgia, with acute drawing pains, or successive pullings, provoked or aggravated by the touch. Swelling of the gums at night, with acute pulling in the temples. Fetid odour from the mouth, perceptible to the patient. Pulling and quivering in the tongue. Swelling of tongue. Rounded elevation in centre of tongue size of pea, surrounded by angry, suspicious-looking base, size of a 5-cent piece, extremely sensitive to touch or food, with drawing sensation, as if a string were pulling centre of tongue towards hyoid bone, with burning in tongue. Dryness of œsophagus. Burning pain in the throat, as from pyrosis. 10.

Pain in left lower row of molar teeth. Swelling of gums. Swelling of tongue. A rounded elevation in centre of tongue, size of a pea, surrounded by an angry suspicious-looking base, size of a nickel five-cent piece, extremely sensitive to touch or food, with a drawing sensation as if a string was pulling centre of tongue towards hyoid bone, with burning in tongue. Bad smell from mouth. Dryness of œsophagus.

stomach_abdomen.text: Burning thirst. Thirst so violent that she could not drink enough water after dinner. Bitter risings. Regurgitation of a bitter acidity. Repugnance to food and constant nausea. Vomiting of white, bitter mucus. Weight, griping; tenesmus with constricting pains under sternum. Sensation in stomach as though it would go to sleep. Sensation of contraction, and pain of ulceration, in the epigastrium. Pressure in region of liver from within outwards. Flatulent colic, painful inflation, esp. after a meal. Colic, redness of face, and yawning in abdominal complaints, > by external heat and by bending oneself double. Umbilical hernia with ulcer, in a screaming infant. Pain and soreness in l. side of abdomen. Constant violent rollings in abdomen.

APPETITE, THIRST. DESIRES, AVERSIONS. [14] [Cast.]. Want of appetite. Thirst is so violent that she could not drink enough water, after dinner. Belching, with stitches in chest. Nausea after urinating. Weight at stomach. Griping in stomach. Tenesmus in stomach, with constrictive pain under sternum. Tension and heaviness in stomach. Emptiness in stomach. Sensation in stomach as though it would go to sleep. Pressure in region of liver from in outward. Pain in left side of abdomen. Colic from flatulency. Yawning, in abdominal complaints. Abdomen distended, in afternoon. Umbilical hernia, with colic, in a screaming infant. Abdomen feels as though full and distended. Above feels as though full and distended. Above left ilium in flanks, sensation of soreness as though from an internal wound. On taking a deep breath stitching pains on both sides in abdomen, above hips to spinal column, extending to region of liver, as though he was being stuck ; in various places above ilium, with needles.

stool_rectum.text: Urgent inclination to evacuate. Diarrhœa accompanied by shivering and by yawning, with burning in the anus, and preceded by pain in the abdomen, with grumbling and borborygmi. Evacuations of sanguineous mucus. Stools: whitish, watery; greenish mucus; contain pus; patient is compelled to sit bent; feels gagged when lying down. Before stool: cutting or pinching colic; painful rumbling; dragging in groin. During stool: fetid flatus, burning at anus. After stool: burning at anus.

Stools : whitish, watery ; bloody mucus ; greenish mucus ; frequent. Stools contain pus ; patient is compelled to sit bent double ; feels gagged when lying down. Before stool : cutting or pinching colic ; painful rumbling ; dragging in groin. During stool : fetid flatus ; burning at anus. After stool : burning at anus. Accompaniments of bowel complaints : yawning ; chilliness ; bad smell from mouth ; violent thirst.

urinary.text: Frequent emission of urine, with burning thirst, day and night. After the emission of urine desire to vomit, and disgust.
Scanty urine ; heat and burning when urinating. After urinating : nausea.

male.text: Seminal emissions, with great excitability of sexual parts.

female.text: Menstruation premature, pains in head and loins, pale, sickly complexion. Pain commences in middle of thighs, extending over limbs and more or less over whole body. Uterine tenesmus, with scanty flow. Leucorrhœa watery or thick; burning. Nausea and vomiting of pregnancy.

During menses : pain commences in middle of thighs, extending over limbs, and more or less over entire body. Dysmenorrhœa ; abdomen distended ; blood leaves uterus in drops, with tenesmus-like pain. PREGNANCY. PARTURITION. LACTATION. [24] [Cast.]. Nausea and vomiting in pregnancy.

back.text: Pain as from excoriation, in the sacral region and back. Drawing pains in nape of the neck.

sleep.text: Restless sleep at night, with anxious agitation and starts with fright. Angry exclamations during sleep. Jerking of the limbs while asleep. Anxious and frightful dreams.
Sleepiness. Constant yawning, though never sleeping in daytime. In sleep, angry exclamations. Cannot sleep after eating.

fever_chill.text: Predominance of cold and shuddering. Fits of shivering with icy coldness in the back. Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main.
Shuddering of single parts, back, vertex, forehead, elbow, feet. (OBS :) Typhus.

respiratory.text: VOICE AND LARYNX. TRACHEA AND BRONCHIA. [25] [Cast.]. Hoarseness with disposition to clear throat. Shortness of breathing, in forenoon ; when walking fast. Short, difficult breathing, with frequent, long inspirations. Very deep inspirations, with heat in breast and in face. Frequent, slow, deep inspirations, with short expirations.

chest_heart.text: Stitches in chest, with belching. Heat in breast, as though a fire was burning there, in evening. Feeling of oppression about heart. Cramplike pains extending across breast. Pain under sternum, when touching it. On taking a deep breath, sensation as though something heavy lay under sternum. Pressure on sides of sternum, especially on expiration. Sensation of internal heat under sternum.

extremities.text: Pain in right shoulder when at rest and in motion, as though he has carried something heavy. Hot hands, with distended veins. Great feeling of lassitude in lower limbs. Pressure in left flank downward through inguinal gland, when walking. Feet are weary, cannot walk any farther. Spasms of hands and feet.

modalities.text: REST. POSITION. MOTION. [35] [Cast.]. During rest and motion : pain in shoulder. Lying down : feels gagged. Morning : irritable. Night : eyes agglutinated. Afternoon : abdomen distended.
